name: Standard Residential Inspection
description: InterNACHI-aligned residential inspection template covering all major home systems. Each item ships with pre-built Information / Limitations / Defects canned comments — toggle, edit, or add your own.

information.title: Material
information.comment: Asphalt composition shingles observed.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Roof covering appears serviceable with no visible defects at the time of inspection.

information.title: Service Life
information.comment: Estimated remaining service life of approximately 10 years based on visible weathering.

limitations.title: Ground-only
limitations.comment: Roof was inspected from ground level / accessible eaves only; areas not safely accessible were not inspected.

limitations.title: Weather
limitations.comment: Areas covered by snow, vegetation, or stored items were not inspected.

defects.title: Missing/Damaged Shingles
defects.comment: Multiple shingles are missing, broken, or lifted; recommend repair by a qualified roofing contractor.

defects.title: Active Leak
defects.comment: Active roof leak observed; recommend immediate professional repair to prevent further water damage.

defects.title: End of Life
defects.comment: Roof appears near end of expected service life; recommend planning for replacement within 1-3 years.

defects.title: Multiple Layers
defects.comment: Multiple layers of roofing observed; full tear-off recommended at next replacement to verify deck condition.

information.title: Penetrations
information.comment: Roof flashing at penetrations and chimney appears properly installed and sealed.

information.title: Valleys
information.comment: Roof valleys and rake edges are properly flashed and sealed.

limitations.title: Visual only
limitations.comment: Concealed flashing under roof covering not directly inspected.

defects.title: Improper at chimney
defects.comment: Improper or missing flashing observed at chimney/wall intersection; recommend correction to prevent leakage.

defects.title: Plumbing vent flash
defects.comment: Plumbing vent flashing shows separation from roof surface; recommend re-sealing.

defects.title: Cracked sealant
defects.comment: Sealant at roof penetrations shows minor cracking; recommend renewal within 12 months.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Gutters and downspouts are securely attached and free of significant debris.

information.title: Cleaning
information.comment: Recommend annual gutter cleaning to maintain proper drainage.

limitations.title: Storm response
limitations.comment: Gutter performance during heavy rain not directly observed.

defects.title: Loose / sagging
defects.comment: Gutters exhibit minor sagging at one or more attachment points; secure or replace damaged sections.

defects.title: Detached / broken
defects.comment: Gutters are detached or severely damaged; replacement recommended.

defects.title: Discharge at foundation
defects.comment: Downspouts discharge directly against the foundation; extend at least 4-6 feet away to prevent foundation moisture issues.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Chimney appears in serviceable condition from accessible vantage points.

information.title: Cap / Spark Arrestor
information.comment: Chimney cap with spark arrestor present.

limitations.title: Internal flue
limitations.comment: Internal flue condition requires Level II inspection by certified chimney sweep.

defects.title: Crown cracked
defects.comment: Chimney crown shows significant cracking; recommend repair or replacement.

defects.title: Leaning
defects.comment: Chimney shows visible lean or separation from structure; recommend evaluation by a structural professional.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Siding and trim appear in serviceable condition with no significant defects observed.

information.title: Paint
information.comment: Exterior paint and finishes are intact with no widespread peeling or weathering.

limitations.title: Vegetation
limitations.comment: Areas concealed by stored items or vegetation were not fully inspected.

defects.title: Loose panels
defects.comment: Multiple loose siding panels observed; reattach to prevent moisture intrusion and wind damage.

defects.title: Wood rot
defects.comment: Significant wood rot observed at trim and siding; replace damaged sections and identify moisture source.

defects.title: Caulking
defects.comment: Caulking at penetrations shows minor cracking; renew when accessible.

information.title: Operation
information.comment: Window frames and exterior doors operate properly and show no significant damage.

limitations.title: Representative
limitations.comment: A representative sample of windows and doors was operated; not every unit was tested.

defects.title: Failed seals
defects.comment: Failed dual-pane window seals observed (condensation between panes); recommend insulated glass replacement.

defects.title: Cracked glass
defects.comment: Window glass is cracked or broken in one or more locations; recommend replacement.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Driveway and walkways show no significant cracks or trip hazards.

limitations.title: Snow / debris
limitations.comment: Surfaces covered by snow or debris not fully inspected.

defects.title: Significant cracks
defects.comment: Concrete walkway shows significant cracking; monitor for displacement and seal larger cracks.

defects.title: Trip hazard
defects.comment: Driveway/walkway exhibits significant displacement creating trip hazard; recommend repair or replacement.

information.title: Slope
information.comment: Grading slopes away from foundation, providing positive drainage.

limitations.title: Dry conditions
limitations.comment: Drainage performance evaluated under dry conditions; behavior during heavy rain not directly observed.

defects.title: Negative grading
defects.comment: Negative grading observed against foundation; regrade to slope away from house at minimum 6 inches over the first 10 feet.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Foundation walls appear sound with no significant cracks, settling, or moisture intrusion observed.

information.title: No water
information.comment: No evidence of past or present water intrusion observed in basement.

limitations.title: Hidden behind finishes
limitations.comment: Hidden defects in foundation walls behind finished surfaces are beyond the scope of a visual inspection.

defects.title: Horizontal/step crack
defects.comment: Horizontal or step-cracking observed in foundation walls indicating possible structural movement; evaluation by a structural engineer recommended.

defects.title: Active water
defects.comment: Active water intrusion observed in basement/crawl space; recommend identifying source and waterproofing as needed.

defects.title: Settlement
defects.comment: Significant foundation settlement observed; structural evaluation by a qualified professional recommended.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Visible structural framing appears intact and properly supported.

limitations.title: Concealed
limitations.comment: Framing concealed by finishes was not directly inspected.

defects.title: WDO damage
defects.comment: Wood-destroying organism damage observed in framing members; recommend treatment and repair by qualified specialist.

defects.title: Sagging
defects.comment: Floor joists or beams show significant sagging, splitting, or notching; structural evaluation recommended.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Crawl space appears dry with adequate ventilation and no visible structural concerns.

information.title: Sump pump
information.comment: Sump pump operates correctly and discharges away from foundation.

limitations.title: Limited access
limitations.comment: Crawl space inspected to extent safely accessible; areas with limited clearance not fully evaluated.

defects.title: Standing water
defects.comment: Standing water observed in crawl space; recommend drainage correction and moisture barrier installation.

defects.title: Missing vapor barrier
defects.comment: Exposed soil in crawl space without vapor barrier; recommend installation of 6-mil polyethylene barrier per code.

information.title: Operation
information.comment: Heating system operated normally during inspection with appropriate temperature rise.

information.title: Combustion air
information.comment: Combustion air supply and venting appear properly configured for fuel-burning equipment.

limitations.title: Ambient conditions
limitations.comment: HVAC inspection performed at ambient conditions; full performance evaluation requires technician with specialized equipment.

defects.title: No response
defects.comment: Heating system did not respond to thermostat call; recommend evaluation by a licensed HVAC professional.

defects.title: Heat exchanger
defects.comment: Heat exchanger condition is unknown and beyond visual inspection; recommend evaluation by a qualified HVAC technician.

defects.title: Flue / vent
defects.comment: Flue/vent connector shows corrosion, improper slope, or disconnection; recommend immediate evaluation for CO safety.

information.title: Operation
information.comment: Cooling system operated normally with appropriate temperature differential at registers.

limitations.title: Cold weather
limitations.comment: Cooling not tested due to outdoor temperature below 65°F; manufacturer guidance prevents testing in cold conditions.

defects.title: Inadequate ΔT
defects.comment: Cooling system showed inadequate temperature differential; recommend evaluation for refrigerant charge or compressor performance.

defects.title: End of life
defects.comment: Cooling system appears to be approaching end of typical useful life (15-20 years); recommend planning for replacement.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Ductwork visible in attic/crawl space appears properly insulated and sealed.

limitations.title: Concealed runs
limitations.comment: Ductwork concealed within walls and ceilings was not directly inspected.

defects.title: Disconnect
defects.comment: Ductwork shows disconnection at one or more joints; recommend re-sealing with mastic or UL-listed tape.

information.title: Clean
information.comment: Air filter is clean and recently replaced.

limitations.title: Size verification
limitations.comment: Filter size and MERV rating verification deferred to homeowner.

defects.title: Dirty filter
defects.comment: Air filter shows moderate dust accumulation; recommend replacement.

defects.title: No filter
defects.comment: No air filter installed at return; recommend immediate installation to protect equipment.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Visible plumbing supply lines appear functional with no active leaks observed.

information.title: Pressure
information.comment: Water pressure tested at representative fixtures appears adequate (40-80 psi range).

limitations.title: Concealed
limitations.comment: Plumbing within walls, ceilings, and below grade not directly inspected; only visible portions evaluated.

defects.title: Polybutylene
defects.comment: Polybutylene supply piping observed; known for premature failure, recommend evaluation for replacement.

defects.title: Galvanized
defects.comment: Galvanized supply piping observed showing corrosion/restriction; recommend replacement to restore water pressure.

information.title: Operation
information.comment: Drains throughout home flow freely with no visible blockages.

limitations.title: Main sewer
limitations.comment: Sewer line condition unknown without video scope inspection.

defects.title: Slow drain
defects.comment: Slow drain observed at one or more fixtures; recommend cleaning to prevent backup.

defects.title: Improper mods
defects.comment: Improper plumbing modifications observed (incorrect slope, missing trap, improper venting); recommend correction by a licensed plumber.

information.title: Operation
information.comment: Water heater operating normally with no visible leaks or corrosion at fittings.

limitations.title: Age estimate
limitations.comment: Manufacture date estimated from data plate; tank interior not inspectable.

defects.title: End of life
defects.comment: Water heater nearing end of typical useful life (10-12 years); recommend planning for replacement.

defects.title: T&P discharge
defects.comment: Water heater T&P relief valve discharge pipe is missing, improperly terminated, or undersized; recommend correction per code.

defects.title: Corrosion
defects.comment: Water heater shows signs of corrosion or improper installation; recommend correction.

information.title: Operation
information.comment: Plumbing fixtures operate properly with no leaks observed.

limitations.title: Representative
limitations.comment: A representative sample of fixtures was operated.

defects.title: Drip / leak
defects.comment: Faucet shows minor drip when off; recommend washer or cartridge replacement.

defects.title: Caulk failed
defects.comment: Caulking at tub/shower perimeter shows minor cracking; renew to prevent moisture intrusion.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Electrical panel appears properly installed with adequate amperage and labeled circuits.

information.title: Labeling
information.comment: Main panel labeling is clear and accurate.

limitations.title: Load test
limitations.comment: Panel was not load-tested; only visual inspection performed.

defects.title: FPE Stab-Lok
defects.comment: Federal Pacific Electric (FPE) Stab-Lok panel observed; known fire safety concerns, recommend evaluation/replacement by a licensed electrician.

defects.title: Zinsco / Sylvania
defects.comment: Zinsco/Sylvania panel observed; known reliability issues, recommend evaluation by a licensed electrician.

defects.title: Double-tap
defects.comment: Double-tapped breakers observed (two wires on a breaker designed for one); recommend correction by a licensed electrician.

information.title: Methods
information.comment: Visible wiring methods appear appropriate for application and properly secured.

limitations.title: Concealed wiring
limitations.comment: Concealed wiring not evaluated; only readily accessible components inspected.

defects.title: Aluminum branch
defects.comment: Aluminum branch wiring observed; recommend evaluation by a qualified electrician for COPALUM/AlumiConn pigtailing.

defects.title: Knob & tube
defects.comment: Knob-and-tube wiring observed; recommend evaluation by an electrician — insurance and capacity concerns common.

defects.title: Open splice
defects.comment: Open electrical splices observed without junction box; recommend immediate correction for fire safety.

information.title: Polarity / ground
information.comment: Tested receptacles operate properly with correct polarity and grounding.

limitations.title: Representative
limitations.comment: A representative sample of receptacles was tested; not every outlet was checked.

defects.title: Reverse polarity
defects.comment: Reverse polarity observed at one or more outlets; recommend correction by a licensed electrician.

defects.title: Open ground
defects.comment: Open ground observed at one or more three-prong outlets; recommend correction or update to GFCI with grounding label.

information.title: Where present
information.comment: GFCI protection present in required wet/outdoor locations.

limitations.title: Older homes
limitations.comment: Pre-1973 wiring may not support GFCI/AFCI updates without rewiring.

defects.title: GFCI missing
defects.comment: GFCI protection missing at kitchen, bathroom, garage, exterior, or other required wet locations; recommend installation per current code.

defects.title: AFCI missing
defects.comment: AFCI protection missing at bedroom circuits where required by current code; recommend update.

information.title: Present
information.comment: Smoke detectors present and tested in main living areas; CO detectors observed where required.

limitations.title: Age unknown
limitations.comment: Manufacture date inside detectors not always visible; replace per manufacturer schedule (10 years typical).

defects.title: Smoke missing
defects.comment: Smoke detectors absent in bedrooms or hallways; recommend installation per current code.

defects.title: CO missing
defects.comment: Carbon monoxide detectors absent in homes with attached garage or fuel-burning appliances; recommend installation.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Interior walls and ceilings appear in serviceable condition with no significant defects observed.

limitations.title: Furniture
limitations.comment: Areas concealed by furniture or stored items not fully inspected.

defects.title: Active staining
defects.comment: Active water staining observed on ceiling/walls indicating ongoing moisture intrusion; recommend identifying source.

defects.title: Mold-like growth
defects.comment: Mold-like growth observed on interior surfaces; recommend evaluation by a qualified mold specialist.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Floor coverings appear in good condition with no significant trip hazards.

limitations.title: Subfloor
limitations.comment: Subfloor below floor coverings was not inspected.

defects.title: Significant deflection
defects.comment: Floor shows significant deflection or unevenness; recommend structural evaluation.

information.title: Code-conforming
information.comment: Stair handrails and guardrails meet code height and have appropriate baluster spacing.

defects.title: Rail issue
defects.comment: Stair handrails or guardrails are missing, loose, or below code height; recommend correction for safety.

information.title: Visible condition
information.comment: Fireplace and visible firebox components appear serviceable.

limitations.title: Chimney internals
limitations.comment: Internal flue condition requires Level II chimney inspection by a certified sweep.

defects.title: Damper
defects.comment: Damper missing, stuck, or improperly seated; recommend repair before use.

information.title: Operation
information.comment: Kitchen appliances operated normally during inspection.

information.title: Anti-tip
information.comment: Range/oven anti-tip bracket installed.

limitations.title: Full cycle
limitations.comment: Built-in appliances operated through normal cycles; long-term performance not guaranteed.

defects.title: Anti-tip missing
defects.comment: Range/oven anti-tip bracket missing; recommend installation for safety per manufacturer.

defects.title: Dishwasher drain
defects.comment: Improper dishwasher drain (no high loop or air gap) observed; recommend correction to prevent backflow.

information.title: Condition
information.comment: Cabinets and countertops appear in serviceable condition.

limitations.title: Cosmetic
limitations.comment: Cosmetic conditions noted at the inspector's discretion.

defects.title: Loose hardware
defects.comment: Loose hinges or pulls observed on one or more cabinets; recommend tightening.

information.title: Operation
information.comment: Kitchen plumbing fixtures operate properly with no leaks observed under sink.

defects.title: Caulking
defects.comment: Caulking at sink rim shows wear; recommend renewal to prevent under-counter moisture.

information.title: Operation
information.comment: Toilets flush and refill properly with no visible leaks at base or supply lines.

limitations.title: Subfloor
limitations.comment: Subfloor condition under toilet not directly inspectable without removal.

defects.title: Rocks at base
defects.comment: Toilet rocks at base or shows water stain on floor; recommend re-setting and inspection of subfloor.

defects.title: Running
defects.comment: Toilet shows minor running between flushes; recommend flapper/fill valve replacement.

information.title: Operation
information.comment: Tub and shower drain freely; no visible defects.

limitations.title: Behind walls
limitations.comment: Areas behind tub/shower walls not visible; concealed leakage cannot be ruled out.

defects.title: Caulking
defects.comment: Caulking at tub/shower perimeter shows minor cracking; renew to prevent moisture intrusion.

defects.title: Failed membrane
defects.comment: Failed waterproof membrane suspected at shower; recommend evaluation by a qualified contractor.

information.title: Operation
information.comment: Bathroom sink and vanity operate properly with no active leaks.

defects.title: Active leak
defects.comment: Active leak observed under sink; recommend immediate repair.

information.title: Vents to exterior
information.comment: Exhaust fan operates and vents to exterior.

limitations.title: Concealed run
limitations.comment: Exhaust duct routing concealed within ceiling cavity not directly traced.

defects.title: Vents to attic
defects.comment: Exhaust fan does not vent to exterior or vents into attic; recommend correction to prevent moisture issues.

information.title: Type / depth
information.comment: Attic insulation appears appropriate type and depth for the climate zone.

limitations.title: Concealment
limitations.comment: Insulation may conceal underlying defects in framing or wiring.

defects.title: Low R-value
defects.comment: Insulation depth significantly below recommended R-value for climate zone; recommend supplemental insulation.

information.title: Adequate
information.comment: Attic ventilation appears adequate with soffit and ridge venting present.

limitations.title: Blocked vents
limitations.comment: Some soffit vents may be blocked by insulation; baffles not always installed.

defects.title: Insufficient
defects.comment: Insufficient attic ventilation observed; recommend additional venting to prevent moisture and ice damming.

defects.title: Bath fan to attic
defects.comment: Bath/kitchen exhaust fan vents directly into attic; recommend correction to prevent moisture damage.

information.title: Operation
information.comment: Garage door operates properly with functional safety reverse mechanism.

defects.title: Reverse failed
defects.comment: Garage door opener safety reverse mechanism failed test; recommend immediate adjustment or replacement.

information.title: Intact
information.comment: Fire-rated separation between garage and dwelling appears intact.

defects.title: Self-close door
defects.comment: Door from garage to dwelling is not self-closing or lacks proper fire rating; recommend correction for safety.

defects.title: Penetrations
defects.comment: Penetrations in fire-rated wall between garage and dwelling not properly sealed; recommend correction with fire-rated sealant.
